name: Path of Swords
description: The warrior's path. Choosing it sets Swords as your highest attribute. (Placeholder talents — the full path grants seven.)

description: The rogue's path. Choosing it sets Pentacles as your highest attribute. (Placeholder talents — the full path grants seven.)
